PowerShell($response = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/admin/settings/sms-gateway" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -SessionVariable session } catch { $null }; if \($response\) { Write-Output "✓ SMS Gateway page accessible \(Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)\)" } else { Write-Output "✗ Server not responding yet, checking serve status..." })

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/admin/settings/sms-gateway" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $response.StatusCode; if \($response.Content -match 'SMS Gateway Settings'\) { Write-Output "`n✓ SMS Gateway page loaded successfully" } else { Write-Output "`n✗ Page content mismatch" })
